event.description:
Update 0: Nitro Smart Document directions with Databricks Cloud will be introduced!

Update 1: Domino cloud platform will be inrtoduced!

Based off of the IPython notebook project, Scala Notebook lets you interact with Scala through a browser in a notebook-like pattern:

* Past commands can be viewed and edited* Rich results (like HTML or images) are interleaved with the commands that generated them* Supports interactive widgets, that allow browser interactions translate into Scala execution and vice versa
One of the original authors will demo Scala Notebook, talk a little about its construction, and answer any questions about it.

Chris Yang is a co-founder of Domino Data Labs, a PaaS for data scientists. Senior developer at Bridgewater Associates, building the next-generation investment analytics platform. Studied CS at MIT.
event.title: Scala Notebook: a Browser-based Interactive Scala Prompt
